description: What makes theMielle Organics and The Lip Barreturn so special is how intentional it feels. Launching during Women’s History Month is the perfect way to celebrate female entrepreneurship and community. We love seeing our favorite brands join forces to create something unique that caters specifically to our needs. This collection is definitely for the girls who want to look good, feel good, and support Black owned excellence all at the same time. Make sure you clear your shelf space because this lavender magic will not stay in stock for long!

Thank you for letting us know.

trend_name: Why Legislation is the New Must Have
description: When we talk aboutBeauty in Policy, we are talking about the freedom to rock our afros, locs, braids, and twists without the fear of being told we are unprofessional. It is about reclaiming our time and our space. As of 2026, more states have joined the movement, passing legislation that makes hair discrimination illegal. This progress is a huge win for everyone who has ever been made to feel like their natural self was not enough for the boardroom or the classroom.

This legislative journey is truly a beauty issue because true glamour starts with being comfortable in your own skin and hair. We are moving toward a world where your career growth is not stunted by the way your hair grows out of your head. It is a beautiful thing to see the law finally catching up to the culture. We give our all to our careers and our communities, so it is only right that the law protects our right to do so as our most authentic selves.

While we celebrate the wins, the journey forBeauty in Policycontinues. There are still many places where these protections are not yet set in stone. We have to stay vocal and continue supporting the leaders who are fighting for our right to be ourselves. This is not just about a hairstyle; it is about dignity, respect, and the freedom to define beauty on our own terms. Let us keep pushing for progress until every single person can show up as their most authentic self every single day.
